text.title: Figma AI Ecosystem Boundary Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when applying figma-ai-ecosystem. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Docs claim agent runs Figma Make via headless browser; breaks every Figma release.
antipattern.root-cause: UI puppetry treated as a stable agent surface.
antipattern.fix: Move to REST / Webhooks; downgrade UI surfaces to designer-driven.

antipattern.symptom: Hybrid workflow has no commit gate; nobody knows who shipped the broken asset.
antipattern.fix: Make handoff explicit + add commit checkbox.

antipattern.symptom: Decision frozen in 2025; Figma added agent endpoints in 2026; team still manual.
